Our Heritage

From Ancient Wisdom
to Modern Wellness

In ancient cultures, coconut was considered a divine gift, revered for its purity and symbolic connection to the gods.

They used coconut as offerings to ensure everyone consumed this amazing fruit. Today, we're reviving this sacred wisdom. WIN-DIA bridges the gap between traditional knowledge and modern nutritional science.

100% Natural Ingredients
Traditional Roasting Methods
No Artificial Preservatives
Discover Our Story

Dietary Fiber

Improves Digestion

High fiber content promotes healthy gut function and regular bowel movements

Glycemic Index

Plant Protein

High Protein Content

Keeps you energized and satisfied throughout the day, curbing unhealthy cravings

Perfect for busy mornings
Problem

The Modern Diet Crisis

Today's market is flooded with products claiming to be healthy, but most are processed with hidden ingredients and misleading claims.

  • Processed foods with hidden ingredients
  • Low fiber causing digestive issues
  • Misleading health claims on packaging
  • Rising lifestyle diseases
Solution

WIN-DIA Coconut Flour Khakhra

Not just a health label - our khakhra truly works, thanks to naturally high fiber content from coconut flour.

  • Genuinely supports gut health
  • Noticeable improvement in digestion
  • Feel light and energized after eating
  • Scientifically tested and certified

"WIN-DIA for dine keeps the gut in line"

Innovation

First-of-its-kind
in the World

We transform gluten-free from just a label into a real digestive health solution.

01

Ingredient Innovation

Using coconut flour - a by-product adding value to agri-waste

02

Health-Focused Formula

Supports gut health, vegan, gluten-free

03

Shelf-Life Enhancement

Vacuum packaging extends freshness significantly

NABL LAB TESTED

Craftsmanship

How It's Made

From coconut farm to your plate — a journey of quality and care

01

Premium Coconut Farms

Sourced from the finest coconut farms in Karnataka

02

Cold-Pressed Extraction

Preserving every nutrient and natural coconut essence

03

Nutrient-Rich Flour

Transforming by-product into protein-rich coconut flour

04

Traditional Roasting

Artisanal techniques passed down through generations

05

Quality Assurance

Rigorously tested in NABL-accredited laboratories

06

Premium Packaging

Vacuum-sealed to lock in freshness and crispness
